heroHeadline: 4th Global Bleaching Event Declared as Cleanup Surpasses 10 Million Pounds
heroSubtitle: The Ocean Cleanup extracts 4.5M kg from oceans and rivers while NOAA declares the most severe coral bleaching event ever recorded and the High Seas Treaty gathers momentum toward entry into force.
footerNote: Data sourced from NOAA, UNEP, The Ocean Cleanup, IUCN, Australian Institute of Marine Science, and major scientific institutions. Coordinates verified against NOAA and OpenStreetMap references.
